# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Ref S3AccessPolicy
        - !Ref DynamoDBAccessPolicy
        - !Ref SQSAccessPolicy
        - !Ref SNSAccessPolicy
        - !Ref CloudWatchAccessPolicy
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:*
            Resource: "*"
  DynamoDBAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: DynamoDBAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - dynamodb:*
            Resource: "*"
  SQSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: SQSAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:*
            Resource: "*"
  SNSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: SNSAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sns:*
            Resource: "*"
  CloudWatchAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CloudWatchAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - cloudwatch:*
            Resource: "*"
